name: Scott Weiland
title: Scott Weiland - taken night of 12/2/2015, found dead on his tour bus the next night 12/3/2015, 48
description: Scott Weiland - taken night of 12/2/2015, found dead on his tour bus the next night 12/3/2015, 48
bio: Scott Weiland was an American singer and songwriter, best known as the lead vocalist of Stone Temple Pilots and Velvet Revolver. His powerful voice and dynamic stage presence defined 1990s alternative rock.
